description: Create an SLD style named 'area_classification' in the 'ne' workspace that uses the OGC 'area' function to dynamically color features. Features with an area less than 15.0 square degrees must have a red fill (#FF0000), and features with an area greater than or equal to 15.0 square degrees must have a gray fill (#AAAAAA). Set this as the default style for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer and export an 800x400 PNG map preview of the global extent (-180,-90,180,90) to /home/ga/area_map.png.
